name: bench-my-harness
author: Vinicius Lana <vini@aicoders.academy>
description: Benchmark and observability harness for comparing agentic coding tools.

scripts.build: npm run clean && find src -name '*.ts' -print0 | xargs -0 tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --esModuleInterop --forceConsistentCasingInFileNames --skipLibCheck --outDir dist --rootDir src --types node
